sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for SNES port

special_mechanics.name: Skill System
special_mechanics.description: Lemmings are autonomous creatures assigned various skills to navigate levels. Skills include mobility enhancers (Runner, Icarus Wings), terrain modifiers (Builder, Planter, Miner, Bazooker), and behavior modifiers (Blocker, Attractor). Total of 43 new skills plus 8 original skills from first game.

special_mechanics.name: Fan Tool
special_mechanics.description: Unlimited player-controlled fan tool that propels lemmings with relevant skills (Ballooner, Surfer) and powers mechanisms throughout levels based on proximity and position.

special_mechanics.name: Classic Tribe Behavior
special_mechanics.description: Classic tribe preserves Blocker skill from original Lemmings and rolls back updated behavioral quirks to resemble original game more closely.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Qualitative only. This is a puzzle game where lemmings move autonomously with assigned skills. No quantitative physics parameters are documented in available sources. SNES port suffered from technical limitations with several features cut from original versions.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Lemmings 2: The Tribes (SNES)
